title: Agarest: Zero
notes: Causes Wine/Proton to stop responding at start-up sometimes. Has identical issues to Agarest: Generations of War regarding missing codecs and inability to play the game because it crashes at start-up.
Seems to have the same issues as the other Agarest games (hangs on startup)
